feature: MillenniumIT P4a — Short Selling + RFQ + Give-Up
requirement: Short selling controls with locate, RFQ system, give-up trade transfer

tasks.title: Short selling + RFQ + give-up types/stores/handlers/engine/gateway
tasks.description:
Add short selling, RFQ, and give-up features.

APPEND to types.go:
- LocateRequest struct: ID, InstrumentID, BorrowerFirmID, LenderFirmID, Quantity int, Status (PENDING/APPROVED/REJECTED/EXPIRED/USED), ExpiresAt, CreatedAt — json tags
- Add ShortSellRestricted bool field to Instrument struct
- RequestForQuote struct: ID, InstrumentID, RequestorFirmID, Quantity int, Side string, Status (OPEN/RESPONDED/EXPIRED/CANCELLED), ResponseQuoteID, TenantID, CreatedAt, ExpiresAt — json tags
- GiveUpRequest struct: ID, TradeID, FromFirmID, ToFirmID, Status (PENDING/ACCEPTED/REJECTED), Reason, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt — json tags

APPEND to store.go:
- LocateStore: Create, Get, List(firmID), Approve(id, lenderFirmID), Use(id), InMemory
- RFQStore: Create, Get, List(instrumentID, status), Respond(id, quoteID), Cancel(id), InMemory
- GiveUpStore: Create, Get, List(firmID), Accept(id), Reject(id, reason), InMemory

Create handlers_locate.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/locates — request locate (validate: instrument_id, borrower_firm_id, quantity>0)
- GET /api/v1/securities/locates — list (?firm_id=)
- POST /api/v1/securities/locates/{id}/approve — approve with lender_firm_id
- Wire into order submission: SHORT_SELL orders must provide locate_id, validate locate is APPROVED and not expired/used

Create handlers_rfq.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/rfq — submit RFQ (validate: instrument_id, quantity>0, side)
- GET /api/v1/securities/rfq — list (?instrument_id=, ?status=)
- POST /api/v1/securities/rfq/{id}/respond — respond with quote_id
- POST /api/v1/securities/rfq/{id}/cancel

Create handlers_give_up.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/trades/{id}/give-up — initiate give-up {to_firm_id}
- GET /api/v1/securities/give-ups — list (?firm_id=)
- POST /api/v1/securities/give-ups/{id}/accept
- POST /api/v1/securities/give-ups/{id}/reject — with reason

Update server.go + main.go + gateway routes.

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for short selling, RFQ, give-up
tasks.description:
Write tests.

Tests:

1. store_test.go:
- TestLocateStore_Create_Approve_Use
- TestLocateStore_ListByFirm
- TestRFQStore_Create_Respond_Cancel
- TestGiveUpStore_Create_Accept_Reject

2. handlers_locate_test.go:
- TestRequestLocate_Success → 201
- TestApproveLocate → 200
- TestShortSellWithLocate — submit SHORT_SELL with valid locate → succeeds
- TestShortSellWithoutLocate — SHORT_SELL without locate → 422
- TestShortSellRestrictedInstrument → 422

3. handlers_rfq_test.go:
- TestSubmitRFQ → 201
- TestRespondToRFQ → 200
- TestCancelRFQ → 200
- TestListRFQ_FilterByStatus

4. handlers_give_up_test.go:
- TestInitiateGiveUp → 201
- TestAcceptGiveUp → 200
- TestRejectGiveUp → 200

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md
